steps.title: Use the problem-solution frame
steps.content: The text says transmitting biomolecules through plant cell walls is difficult, then says carbon nanotubes can cross those walls. The blank needs a verb for getting past that difficulty.

steps.title: Compare the words
steps.content: Choice A means form an idea of; Choice B means ignore; Choice C means show or depict. Choice D, overcome, means successfully deal with a problem and fits the carbon-nanotube solution. The answer is D.
